resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def removeSubfolders(self, folder: List[str]) -> List[str]:
        folder.sort()
        res = []
        for f in folder:
            if not res or f[:len(res[-1])] != res[-1]:
                res.append(f)
        return res
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n log n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The problem can be solved by sorting the folders and then iterating through the sorted list. We keep track of the last added folder and only add a new folder if it is not a subfolder of the last added folder. This approach ensures that we remove all subfolders and maintain the correct order of the remaining folders.
